arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City XI vs Luton Town as Ruben Selles faces big midfield dilemma
arts.sum: Palmer skipped international duty with Jamaica in a bid to firm up his fitness for the run-in, and after two blistering cameo displays which helped City see off Oxford and get a point against Albion, he must be close to a starting berth. Hull City head coach Ruben Selles faces a dilemma or two when the Tigers return to action on Saturday with another huge home game against relegation rivals Luton Town.

arts.ttl: Acun Ilicali sent Ruben Selles message as Hull City given relegation warning
arts.sum: But despite growing positivity around the club, Ruben Selles' men remain just three points above the drop zone with eight left to play. Sky Sports pundit and former striker Don Goodman has warned that Hull City cannot afford to take anything for granted in their quest to avoid relegation.

arts.ttl: The unwanted record Hull City must avoid against Luton Town in crunch Championship six-pointer
arts.sum: Boss Ruben Selles will be desperate to halt that alarming run, especially as it comes against the Hatters, who boast the best record in the Championship over the past 15 international breaks dating back to the 2021/22 campaign, but sit second bottom of the table and four points adrift of safety. Their last victory straight off the back of an international break came in November 2021 when the Tigers beat Birmingham City 2-0 in front of 12,409 at the MKM Stadium, thanks to a goal in each half from George Honeyman and Mallik Wilks - City went on to win four straight games during that run under Grant McCann just prior to Acun Ilicali's takeover.

arts.sum: When people watch my team, I want them to see they love to play football. It’s not arrogance, but we are four points away from third with eight games to play.
